name: The Burden of Creative Genius
title: Aino: The Burden of Creative Genius
in_play_description: When your Aino, who has this card equipped, is on the field, and you trigger an Electro-Charged, Lunar-Charged, or Bloom reaction: Deal +2 DMG for this instance and attach Empowerment to the 1 card with the highest Current Elemental Dice Cost from your Hand. (Once per Round)

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Aino to a duel at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives

skills.desc:
Combat Action: When your active character is Aino, equip this card.
After Aino equips this card, immediately use Precision Hydronic Cooler once.
When your Aino, who has this card equipped, is on the field, and you trigger an Electro-Charged, Lunar-Charged, or Bloom reaction: Deal +2 DMG for this instance and attach Empowerment to the 1 card with the highest Current Elemental Dice Cost from your Hand. (Once per Round)
(You must have Aino in your deck to add this card to your deck.)
